prompt: Create an ultra-premium luxury editorial fashion portrait of a stunning East Asian supermodel with flawless natural beauty, luminous skin, defined facial features, glossy soft waves, and a confident high-fashion expression. She is elegantly seated on a minimalist matte-black cube, one leg gracefully crossed over the other to emphasize long, elegant legs. One hand rests naturally behind her on the cube for support while the other gently touches her hair, creating a relaxed yet powerful editorial pose. Chin slightly raised, shoulders open, direct confident gaze toward the camera. She wears a deep crimson liquid-satin couture gown with a halter neckline, subtle front keyhole detail, sculpted waist, dramatic thigh-high slit, and an extra-long flowing train spreading beautifully across the reflective floor. Metallic gold stiletto heels, delicate ruby earrings, and minimal luxury jewelry complete the look. Background: Crimson Luxe Studio featuring a seamless deep crimson backdrop with subtle smoky texture, a single angled cinematic spotlight cutting through fine haze, glossy reflective burgundy floor, soft atmospheric diffusion, and a clean luxury fashion studio aesthetic. Lighting: Professional Hollywood beauty lighting with a large overhead octabox, soft front key light, subtle warm rim light, gentle red edge lighting, natural shadows, and realistic light falloff. Color grading: Rich crimson tones, warm skin highlights, premium HDR contrast, true-to-life colors, elegant cinematic finish. Shot on a professional full-frame camera with an 85mm portrait lens at f/2.0, featuring shallow depth of field, beautiful creamy bokeh, subtle cinematic film grain, ultra-precise skin micro-texture, realistic fabric weave, natural hair strand detail, physically accurate lighting, premium editorial luxury fashion photography, captured entirely in-camera, absolutely no CGI look, ultra hyper-realistic 8K, razor-sharp focus, museum-quality detail.

promptZh: 创作一张超高端奢华时尚杂志肖像，主角是一位令人惊艳的 东亚超模，拥有完美无瑕的自然美感、透亮肌肤、轮廓分明的面部特征、光泽柔顺的波浪卷发，以及自信的高级时尚表现力。她优雅地坐在一个极简主义哑光黑色立方体上，双腿优雅交叠，凸显修长美腿。一只手自然地撑在身后的立方体上，另一只手轻抚秀发，呈现出一种既放松又充满力量的杂志大片姿态。下巴微抬，双肩舒展，眼神直视镜头，充满自信。她身着一件 深红色 液态绸缎高级定制礼服，采用挂脖领口设计，胸前有精致的镂空细节，腰部剪裁修身，配有极具戏剧性的高开叉设计，超长的拖尾在反光地面上优美地铺展开来。金属金色细高跟鞋、精致的红宝石耳环以及极简的奢华珠宝点缀，使整体造型更加完美。背景：深红奢华摄影棚，采用无缝深红背景幕，带有微妙的烟雾质感，一道电影级斜向聚光灯穿透薄雾，地面为光泽反光的酒红色，营造出柔和的氛围扩散效果，呈现干净的奢华时尚摄影棚美学。布光：专业好莱坞美妆布光，使用大型头顶八角柔光箱，柔和的前置主光，微妙的暖色轮廓光，柔和的红色边缘光，自然的阴影，以及逼真的光线衰减效果。调色：浓郁的深红色调，温暖的肤色高光，高级 HDR 对比度，真实色彩，优雅的电影级质感。使用专业全画幅相机搭配 85mm 人像镜头拍摄，光圈 f/2.0，呈现浅景深效果，背景虚化柔美，带有微妙的电影胶片颗粒感，超精准的皮肤微纹理，逼真的织物纹理，自然的头发丝细节，物理级精准布光，顶级杂志奢华时尚摄影，完全实拍，绝无 CGI 感，超写实 8K 分辨率，焦点锐利，博物馆级细节。
